author: barnabasbusa
content:
```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: ethrex
      el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-5
    - el_type: nethermind
      el_image: ethpandaops/nethermind:glamsterdam-devnet-5
  cl:
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:glamsterdam-devnet-5
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:glamsterdam-devnet-5
    - cl_type: grandine
      cl_image: ethpandaops/grandine:glamsterdam-devnet-5-minimal
    - cl_type: nimbus
      cl_image: ethpandaops/nimbus-eth2:glamsterdam-devnet-5-minimal
    - cl_type: teku
      cl_image: ethpandaops/teku:glamsterdam-devnet-5
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:glamsterdam-devnet-5-minimal
network_params:
  preset: minimal
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  withdrawal_type: "0x01"
  validator_balance: 40000
  genesis_gaslimit: 150000000
  gas_limit: 150000000

additional_services:
   - assertoor
   - spamoor
   - dora
   - otel

assertoor_params:
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-lifecycle.yaml" }


port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true



global_log_level: debug
```

author: barnabasbusa
content: this is a big matrix tho

author: barnabasbusa
content: but I was able to reproduce forking behaviour very quickly
